input: Hi Jane, thank you so much for taking the time to chat earlier this week. I really appreciated your questions. As discussed, the annual price would be 40000 dollars and we can start whenever suits you. Let me know your thoughts when you get a chance. Warm regards, Sam
idealOutput: Hi Jane — as discussed, the annual price is 40000. Happy to start whenever works. Best, Sam

input: Hello Priya, I wanted to follow up on our conversation and confirm that the demo is scheduled for Thursday at 2pm, which I believe works well for everyone on your side and ours. Looking forward to it.
idealOutput: Hi Priya — confirming the demo for Thursday at 2pm. Looking forward to it.

input: Hi Marc, happy to find time to talk through the rollout.
idealOutput: Hi Marc, happy to find time to talk through the rollout. Grab a slot here: cal.com/sam

input: Thanks for the update on Orion.
idealOutput: Thanks for the update on Orion. The next step on our side is a security review — can we set that up this week?

input: Hi Dana, we can offer a 15 percent discount and the contract is ready to sign.
idealOutput: Hi Dana, the contract is ready to sign whenever you are.

input: I think maybe we could possibly start the Vertex pilot in September.
idealOutput: We can start the Vertex pilot in September.

input: Hi there, I completely understand that you are also taking a serious look at Wingman as part of your evaluation, and that makes a lot of sense given where you are in the process.
idealOutput: Understood that you're also evaluating Wingman — happy to help you compare.

input: Following up to confirm that the Quantum budget was approved at 80000, which is great news and means we can move ahead with the original scope we discussed in detail last month.
idealOutput: Confirming the Quantum budget was approved at 80000 — we can move ahead with the original scope.

input: Hi Lee, sending over the proposal shortly.
idealOutput: Hi Lee, sending over the proposal shortly — the deadline on our end is March 15.

input: So sorry for the delay! The Nimbus blocker is procurement approval, which we are chasing.
idealOutput: The Nimbus blocker is procurement approval, which we're chasing now.

input: As you may recall, Priya is the VP of Engineering at Meridian, and she will be the main technical point of contact throughout the entire engagement going forward.
idealOutput: Priya, VP of Engineering at Meridian, is our main technical contact.

input: We have strong support inside Falcon.
idealOutput: We have strong support inside Falcon — Dana, their CTO, is championing it.

input: Just to recap everything we covered: the Halcyon renewal is 32000 and it lands in September, and we will need to start the paperwork a few weeks ahead of that to be safe.
idealOutput: Recap: the Halcyon renewal is 32000, landing in September — we'll start paperwork a few weeks ahead.

input: Amazing!! Can't wait to get started with the Zephyr project!!
idealOutput: Looking forward to getting started with the Zephyr project.

input: Hi Sam, let me know what works for a quick chat.
idealOutput: Hi Sam, let me know what works for a quick chat — happy to jump on a call if easier.

input: Confirming again for the record that the Orion contract value is 45000 and the security review is the agreed next step before we can countersign anything on our end.
idealOutput: Confirming the Orion contract value is 45000; the security review is the agreed next step.
